programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families

programme.desc: Jon visits Tracy, California, to help the divorced owners of Grant Bar & Lounge clean up their act and bring cohesion to their competing nightclub/restaurant concept.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the owner of Jolt'n Joe's in San Diego was diagnosed with cancer, he began leaning on his manager, but a broken promise over equity threatens to run the bar into the ground.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon, joined by rapper T-Pain, is in Sacramento, California, to convince Kings fan Chris he needs to change his sports bar concept if he's ever going to make money.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to Orange County, California, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon drops in on the lively Bottoms Up Bar and Grill in Stanton, California, to teach the owner's son how to manage a rowdy atmosphere while still keeping patrons happy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Phoenix to help the owner of The Armadillo Grill get her business back in order as she desperately tries to pay back her father, but faces $450,000 of debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Undefeated Welterweight Ukrainian champ Yaroslav Amosov puts his belt on the line against Jamaican Jason Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Hollywood, Florida with an explosive night of fights. Champion Eddie Alvarez defends his belt against Lightweight Tournament Winner Michael Chandler in one of Bellator MMA's most epic fights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Irvine with two belts on the line! First Pat Curren defends his Featherweight belt against Patricio 'Pitbull' Freire. Then in the main event, Michael Chandler takes on Rick Hawn for the Lightweight World Championship.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, Oklahoma as Ben Askren defends his Welterweight belt against Season 7 tournament winner Karl Amoussou. Plus the Bellator MMA debut of King Mo fighting in his home state.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Atlantic City, NJ with the Featherweight Championship belt on the line! Champion Pat Curran defends his title against Season 8 Featherweight tournament winner Shahbulat Shamhalaev.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Rio Rancho, NM. Welterweight Champion Ben Askren takes on Welterweight season 8 tournament winner Andrey Koreskov. Then Michael Chandler defends his Lightweight belt against the Lightweight season 8 tournament winner David Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Michael Chandler once again goes up against Eddie Alvarez in a rematch for the Lightweight title. Also, Pat Curran defends his Featherweight belt against Daniel Straus and King Mo takes on Emanuel Newton for the Light Heavyweight title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Atlantic City, NJ. The Heavyweight belt is on the line as champion Alexander Volkov takes on Vitaly Minakov. Then in the main in the event Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson makes his Bellator MMA debut against Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Hammond, Indiana with the Featherweight World Title on the line as Champ Daniel Straus and former Champ Pat Curran meet for a third time to decide who walks away with the title.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Drink spiking is on the rise and extremely underreported.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Trad-wife Estee talks about why she gave up a career to be a full-time housewife and submit to her husband. She confronts critics who say she’s betraying feminism and setting women back decades.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil reveals a serious threat to the future of America, one that could threaten every aspect of its infrastructure, leaving families and businesses helpless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: A Dr Phil exclusive: A one hour interview with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, unedited, commercial-free from Israel, at perhaps the most critical time in the conflict.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Two mothers who struggle with obesity use the GLP-1 shot to lose weight and now say they want their children to do the same.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Trigger Warnings do not work, yet trigger warnings, originally used for people suffering from PTSD, are now being used everywhere for everything.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: The latest report by the CDC found 488 people died from alcohol related issues every day during the pandemic, reporting a surge in consumption that hadn’t been seen in 50 years. But many claim the problem is not getting better.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Student athletes say they were hazed, physically & sexually assaulted by their teammates inside the locker rooms. They blame the coaches and the schools for not punishing those responsible and for shaming them. But Dr. Phil blames someone else.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: College campuses, including elite institutions, are seeing protests by pro-Hamas groups and outside agitators. There's a growing hate movement targeting Jews, Israel, and America, challenging our culture and principles.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Is there a wave of migrant crime? High-profile news stories have become lighting rods highlighting the issues with sanctuary cities and policies across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil is joined by NYPD Chief of Patrol John Chell to discuss concerns of rise in migrant crime as recent headlining news has sparked national debate on the safety of our communities across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil goes inside NYPD headquarters where officers are working around the clock to keep the city safe. Ride a-long with NYPD as they patrol the city's most dangerous streets, showing us first-hand the challenges they're up against.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: When it comes to the future America’s workforce, many business owners claim the country is in serious trouble due to many young adults having a lazy and poor work ethic. But these young adults claim they are not lazy, they are just misunderstood.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Almost 75% of people don't like their neighbors citing some of the following reasons: 'odd vibes', 'too loud', or 'flat-out rude'. Dr. Phil sorts out this unusual feud: Iguanas wreak havoc in Florida and the feud with the neighbor who feeds them!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E004) After an illegal late-night poker game, Brandon and Dylan clash over a break-in at the beach club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E005) Kelly is mortified when her mother starts dating David's father and plots to break up the new couple.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E007) The gang heads up to Yosemite on what turns out to be a totally doomed camping trip.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E009) An effort to create a neighborhood security patrol goes horribly awry resulting in race hate and violence.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E010) When Dylan's long-absent mother moves back into his life - not to mention into his home - things come to a head, forcing Dylan to confront his issues not only with his mother, but with himself as well.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E011) Brandon and Brenda's paraplegic cousin Bobby is visiting Beverly Hills - and Kelly finds him extremely interesting!

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E012) Andrea wins a high-school journalism contest, but her victory is marred by a school district investigation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E013) The gang goes to a Halloween party, but things take a turn for the worst when Kelly's seductive costume catches the eye of a college student whose intentions are less than honorable.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E015) Emily invites everyone to a secret party at an underground club - where she does something that could end her relationship with Brandon forever.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E016) Emily refuses to accept the fact that Brandon no longer wants to see her and spirals out of control - and Brenda's the only one who might be able to talk her down.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E019) Brandon makes a connection with an aspiring figure skater that could melt ice - but is banned from seeing her by her overprotective coach.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E020) Andrea launches a campaign to create awareness about AIDS and other STDs at West Beverly and finds herself going up against some powerful opponents.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E021) Kelly's loose lips let slip an explosive secret that almost destroys her mother's relationship with Mel.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E022) Dylan's attempts to help a friend through AA put a serious strain on his relationship with Brenda.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Andre gives Ted relationship advice. Chelsea and Madison take a big step in their relationship. Bill's recovery leaves Hayley with more questions than answers.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vernon takes matters into his own hands. Vanessa leans into her new partnership with Joey. Nicole has life-changing news for Ted.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat has a romantic surprise for Tomas, Jacob worries Smitty's investigation will hurt his father's reputation, and Bill and Dani share a heart to heart.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani is suspicious of Hayley, Nicole confronts Andre and Martin sets a plan in motion to absolve his past.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva tackles her first day working for Ted, Ashley and Andre discuss their options and Anita receives surprising news from her family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie attempts to make amends with her daughter, date night proves challenging for Chelsea and Madison and Joey's offer amuses Bill.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Smitty puts his nose where it doesn't belong and Elon is displeased, Randy tells Joey he solved one of their problems but may have gained another in the process, and Chelsea's past comes back to haunt her and Madison.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: A shocked Martin puts Tyrell on lockdown, Ashley and Andre have an awkward encounter with Derek during their night out, and Dani refuses to give Bill or Hayley what they want.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Smitty and Jacob compare notes, and it unearths a startling memory for Jacob, Vanessa serves Joey an ultimatum, and Dani gets territorial over Andre.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Pamela has an unconventional idea for the modeling agency, Kat sabotages Eva's new position at Ted's office, and Nicole hits her boiling point with Leslie.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin takes extreme measures to protect his family, Madison has some major doubts when it comes to being with Chelsea, and The Articulettes are at odds, which could derail their reunion concert.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin has a physical altercation with the stranger. Hayley tries to reconnect with Ashley. Chelsea reassures a wary Madison that her ex is in the past.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Joey sends Marcel on a dangerous assignment. Naomi follows a lead into June's past. Smitty takes matters into his own hands where his family is concerned.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin reveals the truth about what happened two years ago. Anita returns home and is stunned to hear what's gone down while she's been away. Vernon and Bill clash over who's really calling the shots.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Jacob arrives with grave news for Smitty. Vanessa imparts information that sends Nicole on a fact-finding mission. The Duprees open their home to a new house guest.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita has some choice words for her daughter. Samantha makes a plea to her father. Elon puts Jacob in his place and asserts control over the investigation in the process.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole confronts Ted about yet another secret he's been harboring. Anita tries to ease Vernon's guilt. Chelsea is livid with her father.

While excitedly preparing for Brenda's high school graduation, Mary is stricken with appendicitis and ends up sharing a hospital room with a woman who has had extensive plastic surgery.

In order to insure the success of a big construction deal, Lester swears Mary to secrecy about the identity of his famous houseguest/investor, the Marvelous Marvin Hagler, an effort that nearly sends Mary down for the count.

At the same time Mary is directing a church production of The Wiz, the Jenkins family opens their home to Alexandria DeWitt, an intellectually precocious 11-year-old college freshman whose presence causes friction in the household.

While waiting to depart for Acapulco, Mary is dreamingly transported to Casablanca, with Lester as the lovelorn 'Rick' and Billy Dee Williams as Billy Dee Hasbro, her attractive, but vague, freedom fighter husband.
Mary and her neighbors turn a local teen beauty pageant upside down when they learn that Brenda and the other contestants are required to compete in a bikini competition.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un altamente clasificado vehículo robotizado llamado Otto causa la muerte de una teniente de la Marina, Gibbs y el equipo analizan si se trata de un suicidio o un homicidio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo se dirigen velozmente a una escena del crimen donde un oficial de inteligencia de alto nivel fue asesinado, descubriendo que el crimen sucedió tres días antes y fue "investigado" por autoridades locales.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de la pérdida de 10 kilogrmos de armas químicas altamente tóxicas, Gibbs y su equipo luchan por localizarlas. El equipo de NCIS se horroriza cuando descubren que las armas químicas están en posesión de un buscado terrorista llamado Mamoun Sharif.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en retirarse hasta que Erin lo llama para ayudarla con un caso que involucra a su ex, Jack. Jamie y Eddie se infiltran como pareja, y Frank enfrenta a la nueva alcaldesa, Margaret Dutton.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Erin contra la famosa traficante de personas Chao Lin (Tia Carrera) se pone en peligro cuando el juez a cargo aparece muerto, y Danny y Baez deben investigar el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Crimes Of The Century (2013)
programme.desc: Ted Kaczynski planted or mailed 16 homemade bombs to unsuspecting victims.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Watching football turns a couple against each other, a cop gets fed up with a repeat shoplifter, and a man tries to swallow a bag of marijuana before officers find it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle leads an officer on a hot pursuit, a deputy encounters a nervous driver with a big secret, and a young cyclist tries to make a quick getaway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist crashes into an occupied trailer, a stubborn suspect plays dumb, and officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young driver sends a deputy on a high-speed chase, a woman's ride home from work turns into a nightmare, and officers find hard drugs in a troubled couple's car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man apologizes profusely after leading an officer on a foot chase, a passenger in a car chase tells conflicting tales, and police find a wanted man on a roof.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police collect DNA to establish ownership of a sketchy cigarette pack, investigate an assault between elderly roommates, and question a man claiming to be framed by his ex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a man about to confront his wife for her accusations about his sexuality, search a baton-wielding cyclist, and check the prints of a man with no identification.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tackles a masked man with an outstanding warrant, an erratic driver is stopped driving to a nail salon, and police respond to a domestic assault involving hot wax.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted woman gives deputies a fake name, but her brother accidentally reveals the truth, and two officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass viaja a Hollywood, California, para intentar localizar a la amiga de su hija distanciada, mientras intenta reavivar algún tipo de relación con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de un paciente de un hospital psiquiátrico y rápidamente reducen los sospechosos a un puñado de otros pacientes y miembros del personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre (Alan Rosenberg) con el que Catherine flirteó en un bar reaparece en su vida como sospechoso en la investigación del asesinato de una mujer a la que dispararon y mataron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos amorosos estudiantes de primer año son encontrados muertos en un saco de dormir en un dormitorio, y Sara y Greg se topan con un callejón sin salida tras otro mientras intentan determinar por qué fueron asesinados los estudiantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro equipo forense vuelve a estar unido, con Grissom y Catherine liderando tres fantásticos misterios forenses.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una estrella de cine es encontrada muerta en su habitación de hotel después de una fiesta, mientras que un taxista muerto lleva al equipo a una serie de muertes que involucran a trabajadores inmigrantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro grupo de investigación de crímenes intenta determinar si hubo juego sucio en la caída de un ama de casa por las escaleras.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en medio de la noche, en una casa suburbana al borde del desierto de Las Vegas, revela un vertedero de cadáveres.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una familia de 4, es brutalmente asesinada en su propia casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determina que el suicidio de una joven madre fue en realidad un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family is slaughtered in their home, Horatio and the team try to find the killer with the evidence left at the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed in downtown Miami during rush hour and Horatio and the team must catch the killer fast.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A professor from a local university is found hanging from a tree after being tortured, she had been tortured for at least 4 hours before the hanging.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an unidentified girl is found dead near a very strict rehabilitation camp, Horatio and the team investigate her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate when a prostitute is found stabbed to death and stuffed under a bed after the body was cleaned.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When it's revealed that a ring of underground labs are manufacturing deadly drugs, Horatio and Speedle investigate the situation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Speedle investigate when a burglar and rapist has been sexually assaulted and taped to his bedposts after being suffocated to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are exposed to radiation while investigating a murder, which leads them to an environmental lawyer dying of radiation poisoning.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate the murder of an eastern European immigrant stabbed to death in a peep show booth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team race to find new evidence for a murder trial already underway in order to avoid the conviction of a possibly innocent man.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An ex-con who Horatio sent to jail asks him to help find his missing son. He finds marijuana while searching the boy’s room.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Students from all over the country descend on Miami for a week of fun in the sun. The party comes to a halt when the CSIs are called in on two cases.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan al exmarido de Natalia, la evidencia sugiere que ella lo mató. Muchas personas tenían motivos para matar a Nick. Horatio y los CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida del detective Frank Tripp pende de un hilo cuando pisa una mina terrestre mientras investiga la escena de un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran un camión lleno de armas confiscadas y devuelven las armas al público, Horatio relaciona el crimen con Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Declaran muerto a un miembro del equipo tras recibir un disparo en la cabeza. No queriendo darse por vencido, Horatio hace que el equipo de CSI corra al hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar cuando los padres de una niñera en un vecindario exclusivo son brutalmente asesinados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de caza se vuelve mortal cuando un oso ataca a alguien del grupo y la evidencia sugiere un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un rico promotor inmobiliario, Horatio y el equipo de CSI sospecha de la esposa y las dos hermanas gemelas secretas de ella.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio sospecha que el supervisor del condado y los dueños de un casino de nativos norteamericanos cercano pueden estar involucrados cuando se encuentra a una víctima de asesinato sin el cuero cabelludo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan la muerte de una estrella de cine mientras se encontraba en un centro de rehabilitación de celebridades y estaba a punto de exponer algunos secretos dañinos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un divorcio desagradable empeora aún más cuando la amante del marido aparece muerta y, a medida que aumenta el cantidad de muertos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investiga un caso de venganza contra un ex-amante despreciado. Los problemas personales de un miembro de CSI manchan la investigación y Horatio se ve obligado a despedirlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que un presunto ladrón de autos es asesinado, los CSI se enteran de que la víctima puede haber estado involucrada en el contrabando de drogas frente a las costas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Capturan a un asesino en serie sospechoso de matar a mujeres jóvenes y marcarlas con una "Y" y también lo identifican por tener el cromosoma "Y" adicional.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de un oficial de libertad condicional y Horatio se entera de que uno de los sospechosos puede ser un hijo que él no sabía que tenía.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes up against the deputy chief of detectives when a dark secret from the chief's past threatens his reputation and family.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Spanish club promoter is found dead, Detective Mac Taylor must battle with the head of Barcelona's crime lab to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a tractor-trailer carrying party guests mysteriously ends up at the bottom of the Hudson River, the CSIs must exhume the soggy remains.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs track down a suave and charming hitman, their investigation uncovers a conspiracy with far-reaching implications.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a serial rapist is murdered, restrained in the same manner as his victims, the CSIs weigh a feeling of justice against their sense of duty.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a conspiracy-obsessed woman is found dead, the CSIs investigate and discover that some of her theories may have had some truth to them.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a popular student at Manhattan's most elite private school is murdered, the CSIs find themselves in the competitive world of the overprivileged.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo balances personal and professional challenges when her adopted daughter, Ellie, is the key witness in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team enters the competitive world of gourmet food trucks when one explodes at a SoHo food festival while Hawkes is there with his girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a woman's death as the work of a serial killer. Mac reconnects with his first partner after an ex-con begins stalking him.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac and his ex-partner become part of a vendetta 17 years in the making.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a near-death experience, Detective Mac Taylor becomes quite determined to close his last remaining unsolved case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cayó del cielo (S7 Ep5)
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas en el ático de uno de los abogados más poderosos de Nueva York da un giro extraño cuando el caso lleva al equipo de CSI a un hombre en la morgue.

programme.title: CSI: New York: No salten pasos (S7 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York encuentra un cuerpo en un tejado y debe encontrar al asesino que está manipulando la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Escondite (S7 Ep7)
programme.desc: Con un francotirador suelto en la ciudad de Nueva York, Mac debe revivir un caso de secuestro que podría haber creado uno de los enemigos más letales de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerta del susto (S7 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York pasa por acontecimientos espeluznantes después de que encuentran a una mujer a la que literalmente mataron de miedo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justificado (S7 Ep9)
programme.desc: Mac se enfrenta al subjefe de detectives cuando un oscuro secreto del pasado del jefe amenaza su reputación y a su familia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comprar hasta morir (S7 Ep10)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York buscan al asesino de un gerente de una tienda de departamentos encontrado muerto en un escaparate navideño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Con qué fin? (S7 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre disfrazado de payaso le dispara al dueño de una panadería, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre una decisión del pasado de Flack que puede ponerlo en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Jaula (S7 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un promotor de un club español, el detective Mac Taylor debe enfrentar al jefe del laboratorio de criminalística de Barcelona para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fiesta bajo el agua (S7 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando un camión articulado que lleva invitados a una fiesta termina misteriosamente en el fondo del río Hudson, el equipo de CSI debe exhumar los restos empapados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal con estilo (S7 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI rastrea a un asesino a sueldo afable y encantador, su investigación descubre una conspiración de consecuencias de gran alcance.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justiciera (S7 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando un violador en serie es asesinado e inmovilizado de la misma manera que sus víctimas, el equipo de CSI sopesa el sentido de la justicia frente a su sentido del deber.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Revolver en guardia
programme.desc: Es la historia de un ranchero que, en su lecho de muerte, le confiesa a su hijo la existencia de otro hijo. Ahora, depende de ellos decidir si se quieren en sus vidas.

programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.desc: Un Viejo ganadero de Texas (John Wayne), deberá actuar rápidamente cuando forajidos secuestren a su nieto y hieran a su hijo. Regresa con su familia perdida para ayudarle a buscar al pequeño Jake.

programme.title: Débiles y poderosos
programme.desc: John Wayne interpreta a Dan Roman, un piloto veterano atormentado por un pasado trágico. Ahora relegado a tareas de segundo de a bordo, debe hacer un vuelo de rutina de Honolulu a San Francisco, un vuelo que tendrá un giro aterrador.

programme.title: Cabalgata infernal
programme.desc: Jesse James y su banda cabalgan de nuevo interpretan a unos hermanos de la vida real en esta representación de bandidos del Viejo Oeste. Protagonizada por, David, Keith, y Robert Carradine, James y Stacy Keach, Randy y Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Motín a bordo
programme.desc: Un viaje idílico a Tahití enfrentará a la tripulación y su capitán, cuando tras encontrar un paraíso tropical y sexo ilimitado, el capitán decide zarpar y adentrar a su tripulación en un peligroso viaje alrededor del Cabo de Hornos.

programme.title: Evelyn
programme.desc: Son tiempos difíciles en Dublín, Irlanda. Pero nadie lo tiene más difícil que Desmond Doyle cuando su esposa se marcha y el gobierno decide mandar a su amada hija Evelyn y sus otros dos hijos jóvenes a un orfanato.

programme.title: The Doors
programme.desc: Jim Morrison, una de las figuras más sensuales en la historia del rock and roll, explota en la pantalla en “THE DOORS”, la electrizante película sobre los años sesenta y un descarriado que sacudió la conciencia de Estados Unidos – para siempre.

programme.title: La reina
programme.desc: Intrigante, sincera y cautivadora. La reina muestra una mirada fascinante de la reina Elizabeth II, cuando se encuentra con el primer ministro Tony Blair después de la trágica muerte de la princesa Diana.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: El hombre sin pasado

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Actos de venganza

programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: La habitación
programme.desc: Ocho historias que ocurren en la misma habitación en diferentes períodos de la historia mexicana.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: La venganza de Cenicienta
programme.desc: En este oscuro giro al clásico cuento, Cenicienta busca venganza contra quienes la maltrataron, convirtiéndose en una heroína feroz que enfrenta su destino con valentía.

programme.title: TORO TIBÚRON
programme.desc: Un tiburón hambriento comienza a alimentarse de los desprevenidos visitantes del lago en un pequeño pueblo de Texas.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Piraña 3D
programme.desc: Un terremoto en Arizona abre una fisura en el fondo del lago Havasu, liberando decenas de pirañas prehistóricas que aterrorizan a la ciudad cercana.

programme.title: El bebé de Rosemary
programme.desc: La historia de una joven pareja que espera su primer bebé. Como casi todas las primerizas, Rosemary se siente confundida. Su marido, un actor ambicioso pero sin éxito, hace un pacto con el diablo que promete llevar su carrera a la fama.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Super Hero Movie (LAS)
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.title: Los fantasmas contraatacan
programme.desc: Antes de que la Nochebuena termine, Frank Cross sufra alucinaciones fantasmagóricas y recibirá la visita de un taxista neoyorquino del pasado, una estrafalaria hada del presente, y un sádico mensajero del futuro.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma

programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Manchas delatoras
programme.desc: La policía instituyó una búsqueda intensa cuando la madre de dos niños pequeños desapareció.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.desc: Pauly D has a big surprise for The Situation. Pauly D and Vinny send shock waves through the house when they break their "don't hook up with your exes" rule. Meanwhile Derynn confronts Pretty Ricky again.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The mummies are building a rocket to fire at the pyramid on Mars and release Sutekh.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As the Ogri close in, the Doctor attempts to rescue Romana from hyperspace.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When the Doctor releases two alien justice machines from prison, he gets a death sentence.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
